steps.title: Recognize the linear function form
steps.content:
The function is
$$f(t) = 100 + 25t$$
This is a linear function in the standard form $f(t) = b + mt$, where:
  • $b = 100$ is the y-intercept (initial value when $t = 0$)
  • $m = 25$ is the slope (coefficient of $t$, representing the rate of change)

steps.title: Interpret the slope in context
steps.content: The slope of a linear function represents how much the output changes for each unit increase in the input. Since $t$ is the number of monthly deposits, a slope of 25 means the account balance increases by $\$25$ for each additional deposit. That matches choice A — A is correct.
